nasb.text: Moved with compassion, Jesus stretched out His hand and touched him, and *said to him, “I am willing; be cleansed.”

esv.text: Moved with pity, he stretched out his hand and touched him and said to him, “I will; be clean.”

cnv.text: 耶穌動了憐憫的心，就伸手摸他，說：“我肯，你潔淨了吧！”

ccb.text: 耶稣动了慈心，就伸手摸他，说：“我肯，你洁净了吧！”

csbs.text: 耶稣动了怜悯之心，就伸出手来摸他，说：“我愿意，你洁净了吧！”
